title: Metadata Types Across Data Warehouse Functional Areas
description: A flowchart showing how different types of metadata (Technical, Business, Operational) are generated and used across the key functional areas of a data warehouse (Data Acquisition, Data Storage, Data Access).
relationships: Data Acquisition generates Technical and Operational Metadata
Data Storage holds and manages all three Metadata Types
Data Access consumes Business Metadata and generates Operational Metadata
All metadata flows back to a central Metadata Repository
